hard_reject_hits: 龙proxy在高覆盖帧读成低模球/管
findings: Full-coverage frames f072, f116, and f117 are not accepted: they read as low-poly teal sphere / tube proxy wipes, not as Tiantan-style organic dragon or VFX occlusion.

The dragon proxy is too visually crude to remain a main P06/P08 occluder and dominates the high/full-coverage windows (frames 71-75 and 92-121 per legacy/audit.json combined.high_coverage_frames), preventing Gate D from proving the final animation route.
The gap board does not read as a fixed vertical video window in f001-f064, but f080/f112/f121 are dominated by the dragon proxy.
The near-camera stage, railing, vegetation, base material finish, and temple contact are not strong enough to survive full 463-frame production.
Source honesty is acceptable (scored 4/5): the package clearly discloses the segmented dragon is proxy art, not final T05 art, and keeps the candidate blocked.
reason: Independent visual review rejected Gate D v01. The candidate does not read as a vertical video window, and source honesty is acceptable, but the dragon proxy dominates key occlusion frames, f072/f116/f117 full coverage reads as a low-poly proxy wipe, and near-camera stage/railing/vegetation finish is not strong enough for full 463-frame production.
next_gate: Gate D v02 repair: rebuild or replace the dragon occluder before it dominates f067-f076 and f108-f121, rework high/full coverage wipe windows so they have clear story motivation and polished organic geometry, increase camera pressure in P06/P08 while preserving reveal and post-wipe parallax, improve near-camera model finish for railing/stairs/base/vegetation/temple contact, and submit a new reduced 121-frame package for independent offline review. Keep full 463-frame / WeChat runtime blocked until it passes.
